pages.name: xss_q1
pages.title: Path C — Stored Cross-Site Scripting | Initial Review

elements.name: xss_q1_context
elements.html: Context: You are reviewing a forum page with posts, comments, and a search bar. You have not tested anything yet. What do you do first?

choices.text: Run a network scan to see what other services are open [costs 8 min]
choices.developerNote: WRONG ACTION: deduct time, stay on same question.

choices.text: Search for known vulnerabilities in the forum software [costs 18 min]
choices.developerNote: WRONG ACTION: deduct time, stay on same question.

choices.text: Browse manually and note every place your input appears back on the page [costs 5 min]
choices.developerNote: VALID ACTION: deduct/apply time and advance or follow goto.

pages.name: xss_q2
pages.title: Path C — Stored Cross-Site Scripting | Input Surface Review

elements.name: xss_q2_context
elements.html: Context: The search bar displays your input back in the results heading. What do you do next?

choices.text: Note it as a possible XSS surface and keep checking other inputs [costs 0 min]
choices.developerNote: VALID ACTION: deduct/apply time and advance or follow goto.

choices.text: Ignore the search bar and continue without documenting it [costs 5 min]
choices.developerNote: WRONG ACTION: deduct time, stay on same question.

choices.text: Use the URL structure to identify the backend framework [costs 6 min]
choices.developerNote: VALID ACTION: deduct/apply time and advance or follow goto.

pages.name: xss_q3
pages.title: Path C — Stored Cross-Site Scripting | Comment Testing

elements.name: xss_q3_context
elements.html: Context: You find a comment box under each post. A test comment appears immediately. What is your next move?

choices.text: Jump straight to an active script test before checking how the page stores the comment [costs 15 min]
choices.developerNote: WRONG ACTION: deduct time, stay on same question.

choices.text: Capture the comment request and review the response details [costs 5 min]
choices.developerNote: VALID ACTION: deduct/apply time and advance or follow goto.

choices.text: Post a harmless formatting test and check how it appears in the page source [costs 1 min]
choices.developerNote: VALID ACTION: deduct/apply time and advance or follow goto.

choices.text: Paste a long block of text to test the character limit [costs 7 min]
choices.developerNote: WRONG ACTION: deduct time, stay on same question.

pages.name: xss_q4
pages.title: Path C — Stored Cross-Site Scripting | Script Behavior Check

elements.name: xss_q4_context
elements.html: Context: Your harmless formatting test appears as formatted content instead of plain text. What do you try next?

choices.text: Immediately switch to a simulated credential-capture payload [costs 12 min]
choices.developerNote: WRONG ACTION: deduct time, stay on same question.

choices.text: Test the same harmless marker in the search bar for comparison [costs 4 min]
choices.developerNote: VALID ACTION: deduct/apply time and advance or follow goto.

choices.text: Confirm whether stored content can trigger active behavior before escalating [costs 1 min]
choices.developerNote: VALID ACTION: deduct/apply time and advance or follow goto.

choices.text: Document the finding and leave the path without testing impact [costs 9 min]
choices.developerNote: WRONG ACTION: deduct time, stay on same question.

pages.name: xss_q5
pages.title: Path C — Stored Cross-Site Scripting | Surface Mapping

elements.name: xss_q5_context
elements.html: Context: The comment box looks promising. The forum also displays usernames and profile bios. What do you do next?

choices.text: Stay only with the comment box because it already showed signs [costs 8 min]
choices.developerNote: WRONG ACTION: deduct time, stay on same question.

choices.text: Map where user input appears: comment body, username display, and profile bio [costs 2 min]
choices.developerNote: VALID ACTION: deduct/apply time and advance or follow goto.

choices.text: Create several test accounts and flood the comment section [costs 20 min]
choices.developerNote: WRONG ACTION: deduct time, stay on same question.

choices.text: Check robots.txt and sitemap.xml for hidden pages [costs 6 min]
choices.developerNote: VALID ACTION: deduct/apply time and advance or follow goto.

pages.name: xss_q6
pages.title: Path C — Stored Cross-Site Scripting | Stored Content Decision

elements.name: xss_q6_context
elements.html: Context: You have signs that saved content may be unsafe. What do you do next?

choices.text: Investigate unrelated website directories before continuing [costs 8 min]
choices.developerNote: WRONG ACTION: deduct time, stay on same question.

choices.text: Try to turn the stored content into a simulated credential-capture setup [costs 0 min]
choices.developerNote: VALID ACTION: deduct/apply time and advance or follow goto.

choices.text: Keep changing tags until something else triggers [costs 12 min]
choices.developerNote: WRONG ACTION: deduct time, stay on same question.

pages.name: xss_q7
pages.title: Path C — Stored Cross-Site Scripting | Browser Protection Detour

elements.name: xss_q7_context
elements.html: Context: The credential-capture idea runs into browser protections and does not give direct access. What do you do next?

choices.text: Keep trying to use the blocked session data anyway [costs 10 min]
choices.developerNote: WRONG ACTION: deduct time, stay on same question.

choices.text: Spend time trying to decode the protected session value [costs 8 min]
choices.developerNote: WRONG ACTION: deduct time, stay on same question.

choices.text: Switch to a simulated session-expired prompt to collect test credentials [costs 0 min]
choices.developerNote: VALID ACTION: deduct/apply time and advance or follow goto.

pages.name: xss_q8
pages.title: Path C — Stored Cross-Site Scripting | Stored Behavior Confirmation

elements.name: xss_q8_context
elements.html: Context: You sign into a second test account and view the same forum post. The stored test still triggers for the new account. What do you do next?

choices.text: Build a reflected link and send it to a target [costs 8 min]
choices.developerNote: WRONG ACTION: deduct time, stay on same question.

choices.text: Inspect the page to see where the stored content is being processed [costs 10 min]
choices.developerNote: WRONG ACTION: deduct time, stay on same question.

choices.text: Search the rest of the app for other places the stored content appears [costs 5 min]
choices.developerNote: VALID ACTION: deduct/apply time and advance or follow goto.

choices.text: Confirm it is stored XSS because the saved content triggers for every visitor [costs 0 min]
choices.developerNote: VALID ACTION: deduct/apply time and advance or follow goto.

pages.name: xss_q9
pages.title: Path C — Stored Cross-Site Scripting | Target Audience

elements.name: xss_q9_context
elements.html: Context: The forum has four channels: General Discussion, IT Support, Finance Team, and HR Announcements. Where do you place the stored test next?

elements.name: xss_q9_answer
elements.title: Where do you place the stored test next?

choices.text: Finance Team because approval-related users are more likely to see it [costs 6 min]
choices.developerNote: VALID ACTION: deduct/apply time and advance or follow goto.

choices.text: General Discussion because it has the most traffic [costs 1 min]
choices.developerNote: VALID ACTION: deduct/apply time and advance or follow goto.

choices.text: IT Support because technical users may have more access [costs 4 min]
choices.developerNote: WRONG ACTION: deduct time, stay on same question.

choices.text: All channels at once for maximum reach [costs 14 min]
choices.developerNote: WRONG ACTION: deduct time, stay on same question.

pages.name: xss_q10
pages.title: Path C — Stored Cross-Site Scripting | High-Traffic Placement

elements.name: xss_q10_context
elements.html: Context: General Discussion has a pinned welcome post that every new hire sees. Where do you place the stored test?

elements.name: xss_q10_answer
elements.title: Where do you place the stored test?

choices.text: Skip the pinned post because it may be locked for comments [costs 5 min]
choices.developerNote: WRONG ACTION: deduct time, stay on same question.

choices.text: Avoid the pinned post because it may be moderated [costs 3 min]
choices.developerNote: WRONG ACTION: deduct time, stay on same question.

choices.text: Place it in the welcome post where many users will view it [costs 0 min]
choices.developerNote: VALID ACTION: deduct/apply time and advance or follow goto.

choices.text: Check the pinned post for other links and input surfaces [costs 4 min]
choices.developerNote: VALID ACTION: deduct/apply time and advance or follow goto.

pages.name: xss_q11
pages.title: Path C — Stored Cross-Site Scripting | Payload Choice

elements.name: xss_q11_context
elements.html: Context: The stored XSS is confirmed, but browser protections limit direct session theft. What simulated payload do you try next?

choices.text: Redirect users to an external fake login page [costs 16 min]
choices.developerNote: WRONG ACTION: deduct time, stay on same question.

choices.text: Add a simulated session-expired prompt inside the forum page [costs 1 min]
choices.developerNote: VALID ACTION: deduct/apply time and advance or follow goto.

choices.text: Try broad keystroke collection across the page [costs 7 min]
choices.developerNote: WRONG ACTION: deduct time, stay on same question.

choices.text: Try an interactive browser-control framework [costs 10 min]
choices.developerNote: WRONG ACTION: deduct time, stay on same question.

pages.name: xss_q12
pages.title: Path C — Stored Cross-Site Scripting | Credential Lead

elements.name: xss_q12_context
elements.html: Context: The simulated prompt captures one low-level forum credential. What do you do next?

choices.text: Test it against the forum login to confirm it works [costs 6 min]
choices.developerNote: VALID ACTION: deduct/apply time and advance or follow goto.

choices.text: Check whether the password format suggests a company-wide pattern [costs 0 min]
choices.developerNote: VALID ACTION: deduct/apply time and advance or follow goto.

choices.text: Try the credential against the VPN portal immediately [costs 12 min]
choices.developerNote: WRONG ACTION: deduct time, stay on same question.

choices.text: Add it to the harvest list and wait for more before acting [costs 4 min]
choices.developerNote: VALID ACTION: deduct/apply time and advance or follow goto.

pages.name: xss_q13
pages.title: Path C — Stored Cross-Site Scripting | Credential Review

elements.name: xss_q13_context
elements.html: Context: After more activity, you have a list of captured low-level credentials. What do you do before trying them anywhere else?

elements.name: xss_q13_answer
elements.title: What do you do before trying them anywhere else?

choices.text: Test all of them against the VPN immediately [costs 20 min]
choices.developerNote: WRONG ACTION: deduct time, stay on same question.

choices.text: Confirm which credentials still work on the forum first [costs 7 min]
choices.developerNote: WRONG ACTION: deduct time, stay on same question.

choices.text: Prioritize the list by role, department, and password pattern [costs 2 min]
choices.developerNote: VALID ACTION: deduct/apply time and advance or follow goto.

choices.text: Sort by reused passwords first [costs 4 min]
choices.developerNote: VALID ACTION: deduct/apply time and advance or follow goto.

pages.name: xss_q14
pages.title: Path C — Stored Cross-Site Scripting | Account Prioritization

elements.name: xss_q14_context
elements.html: Context: Three accounts stand out: one Finance user, one IT admin-looking user, and one HR director. Where do you start?

choices.text: Test all three against the VPN for broad access [costs 5 min]
choices.developerNote: WRONG ACTION: deduct time, stay on same question.

choices.text: Check whether any accounts have elevated forum permissions [costs 25 min]
choices.developerNote: WRONG ACTION: deduct time, stay on same question.

choices.text: Test the IT-looking account against the email portal [costs 1 min]
choices.developerNote: VALID ACTION: deduct/apply time and advance or follow goto.

choices.text: Test the HR account against the HR self-service portal [costs 6 min]
choices.developerNote: VALID ACTION: deduct/apply time and advance or follow goto.

pages.name: xss_q15
pages.title: Path C — Stored Cross-Site Scripting | Access Roadblock

elements.name: xss_q15_context
elements.html: Context: The accounts fail against VPN, email, and HR services. A few forum logins work, but nothing gives real access. What do you do?

choices.text: Plant a second stored payload and wait for a larger harvest [costs 28 min]
choices.developerNote: WRONG ACTION: deduct time, stay on same question.

choices.text: Brute force the VPN using the harvested usernames [costs 35 min]
choices.developerNote: WRONG ACTION: deduct time, stay on same question.

choices.text: Try the credentials against every other service you can find [costs 12 min]
choices.developerNote: VALID ACTION: deduct/apply time and advance or follow goto.

pages.name: xss_q16
pages.title: Path C — Stored Cross-Site Scripting | Path Decision

elements.name: xss_q16_context
elements.html: Context: None of the harvested credentials gives a privileged account. The stored XSS is real, but it is not reaching the transfer objective. What do you do?

choices.text: Plant a second payload and try for a larger harvest [costs 20 min]
choices.developerNote: WRONG ACTION: deduct time, stay on same question.

choices.text: Start brute forcing with the harvested usernames [costs 25 min]
choices.developerNote: WRONG ACTION: deduct time, stay on same question.

choices.text: Keep testing credentials against every service you can find [costs 15 min]
choices.developerNote: VALID ACTION: deduct/apply time and advance or follow goto.

pages.name: xss_result
pages.title: Path C — Stored Cross-Site Scripting | Path Result

elements.name: xss_fail_context
elements.html:
Dead End.

The stored XSS path was real. You confirmed unsafe saved content and gathered low-level credentials, but this vector did not reach a privileged account or complete the transfer objective. The strongest clue points back to Finance Operations and the approval workflow.

choices.text: Return to vulnerability choice selection [costs 0 min]
choices.developerNote: VALID ACTION: deduct/apply time and advance or follow goto.
